html:
The Axe is a Tool that can be used to chop down Trees. It can be crafted at the beginning of the game with 1 Twig and 1 Flint. An Axe can also be used as a weapon, dealing 27.2 damage on each hit. With either usage, an Axe has enough durability for 100 swings. When used to chop down Trees, Axe requires 5 chops for small, 10 for medium, and 15 for large Trees. Dead or burnt Trees require only one swing. Currently, the amount of chopping required is independent of the type of the Tree.


Downloadable Content

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Axes can be obtained from the Slot Machine and Steamer Trunk. Luxury Axes can be obtained from the Slot Machine and X Marks the Spot and by using a Trawl Net in the Ocean.

In the Hamlet DLC, Axes can be bought for 5 Oincs at the Pigg and Pigglet's General Store in the Pig City. Three of them are also required to craft the Pigg and Pigglet's General Store using the Key to the City.

  • Consuming dishes with reduces the required number of chops by half. This effect does not apply to the Obsidian Axe.
  • The efficiency of the Shadow Maul varies depending on its level, so it is not listed in the table.
  • Some Characters has different effiency. For example, Wes works 0.5x efficiency and strong Wolfgang works 2x efficiency.

Trivia

  • The Luxury Axe was added in the October 2, 2012 update.
  • The Axe used to have a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine, while the Luxury Axe gave 1-35.
  • Lucy the Axe, a character-specific item, is given to Woodie upon spawn. It acts as an infinite durability Axe that chops Trees much faster but does less damage. 
  • Axes deal the same amount of damage as Boomerangs.

Gallery

  • Wilson wielding an Axe.
  • A bugged axe at 0% durability. Note how the prompt is Examine.
  • Original HD Axe icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

The Axe is a Tool that can be used to chop down Trees. It can be crafted at the beginning of the game with 1 Twig and 1 Flint. An Axe can also be used as a weapon, dealing 27.2 damage on each hit. With either usage, an Axe has enough durability for 100 swings. When used to chop down Trees, Axe requires 5 chops for small, 10 for medium, and 15 for large Trees. Dead or burnt Trees require only one swing. Currently, the amount of chopping required is independent of the type of the Tree.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Shipwrecked DLC, Axes can be obtained from the Slot Machine and Steamer Trunk. Luxury Axes can be obtained from the Slot Machine and X Marks the Spot and by using a Trawl Net in the Ocean.
In the Hamlet DLC, Axes can be bought for 5 Oincs at the Pigg and Pigglet's General Store in the Pig City. Three of them are also required to craft the Pigg and Pigglet's General Store using the Key to the City.

Consuming dishes with reduces the required number of chops by half. This effect does not apply to the Obsidian Axe.
The efficiency of the Shadow Maul varies depending on its level, so it is not listed in the table.
Some Characters has different effiency. For example, Wes works 0.5x efficiency and strong Wolfgang works 2x efficiency.
Usage[edit | edit source]
To chop down a Tree with the Axe, players can right-click it from the inventory to equip it and left-click the Tree (Or press "X" in the console edition). Once the player begins to chop the Tree, holding down the LMB or Spacebar will have the player character keep chopping until the Tree falls. Alternatively, one can chop faster by repeatedly clicking LMB with specific timing.
In addition to chopping down trees, Axes are used in the following crafting recipes.
Outside of chopping trees, the Axe can be a cheap tool to be used as a weapon for early game survival.
×2

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Luxury Axe was added in the October 2, 2012 update.
The Axe used to have a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine, while the Luxury Axe gave 1-35.
Lucy the Axe, a character-specific item, is given to Woodie upon spawn. It acts as an infinite durability Axe that chops Trees much faster but does less damage.
Axes deal the same amount of damage as Boomerangs.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Wilson wielding an Axe.
A bugged axe at 0% durability. Note how the prompt is Examine.
Original HD Axe icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rìu là một Công cụ có thể được sử dụng để chặt cây. Nó có thể được chế tạo vào đầu trò chơi với 1 Cành Cây và 1 Đá Lửa. Rìu cũng có thể được sử dụng làm vũ khí, gây 27,2 sát thương cho mỗi đòn đánh. Với cả hai cách sử dụng, Rìu có đủ độ bền cho 100 lần vung. Khi dùng để chặt Cây, Rìu cần 5 nhát đối với Cây nhỏ, 10 nhát đối với Cây trung bình và 15 nhát đối với Cây lớn. Cây chết hoặc cháy chỉ cần một lần vung. Hiện tại, số lượng chặt cần thiết không phụ thuộc vào loại Cây.

It can be crafted at the beginning of the game with 1 [[Twig]] and 1 [[Flint]]. An Axe can also be used as a weapon, dealing 27.2 {{Hp}} damage on each hit. With either usage, an Axe has enough durability for 100 swings. When used to chop down Trees, Axe requires 5 chops for small, 10 for medium, and 15 for large Trees. Dead or burnt Trees require only one swing. Currently, the amount of chopping required is independent of the type of the Tree. __NOTOC__ ==[[File:Gift Icon.png|32px]] Downloadable Content == In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Axes can be obtained from the [[Slot Machine]] and [[Steamer Trunk]]. Luxury Axes can be obtained from the Slot Machine and [[X Marks the Spot]] and by using a [[Trawl Net]] in the [[Ocean]]. In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Axes can be bought for 5 [[Oinc]]s at the [[Pigg and Pigglet's General Store]] in the [[Pig City]].
